scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tool-boundary/core && npm run build --workspace @tool-boundary/config && npm run build --workspace tool-boundary-gateway && npm run build --workspace @tool-boundary/cli && npm run build --workspace tool-boundary-basic-http-tool && npm run build --workspace tool-boundary-basic-mcp-proxy
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @tool-boundary/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @tool-boundary/config && npm run typecheck --workspace tool-boundary-gateway && npm run typecheck --workspace @tool-boundary/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace tool-boundary-basic-http-tool && npm run typecheck --workspace tool-boundary-basic-mcp-proxy
